summary: Comprehensive testing of Cove legal tech SaaS platform completed successfully. All major features working correctly including onboarding flow, dashboard, compliance matrix, AI summaries, and admin console.

ui_bugs.issue: Mark Complete button not visible for completed obligations (expected behavior)

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Cove logo and Get Started button
4-step onboarding flow (company info, size, sector, sub-sector) works perfectly
Company registration creates company in MongoDB and redirects to dashboard
Dashboard displays compliance score, total obligations, critical items, high priority cards
Dashboard category buttons navigation to compliance matrix works
Compliance Matrix table view with sticky headers, search, severity filter works
Compliance Matrix gantt view toggle works
Obligation detail modal/sheet opens on click
AI Summary generation button works - generates excellent summaries using Claude Sonnet 4.5
Super Admin Console loads with all tabs (overview, users, legislation, analytics)
Admin user management - add user form works
All backend API endpoints working: /api/sectors, /api/companies POST, /api/obligations, /api/ai/summary
Backend API health check passes 100% (20/20 tests)
AI integration with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY works perfectly
Email notifications system functional
Dashboard statistics and analytics working
User management (create/delete) working
Compliance matrix search and filters working
Gantt timeline view working
All onboarding validation working
MongoDB persistence working
